title: VBots x Down to Earth: Summer 2026
description: A Modpack with many things for the Vitruvian Bots FRC team!
body:
[Description Outdated, WIP]

A kitchen sink modpack that for the most part tries to stay vanilla styled, if not vanilla plus.

Some of its core content includes:

- Technology & Automation with **Create** and **ComputerCraft**
- Improved worldgen with **Geophillic**, **Tectonic**, **Amplified Nether**, **Better End & Nether**, and many structure mods including all of **YUNG's Better** series
- Go to space with **Ad Astra**
- Cook food with **Farmer's Delight**
- Improved game systems with **Carry On**, **Villagers: Far from Home**, **End Remastered**, **Tool Trims**, and **Enchancement**
- Subtly enhanced visuals with **Fresh Animations**, **Explosive Enhancement**, **Not Enough Animations**, **Wakes**, and more
- Plenty of compatability mods to improve integration


See the full modlist by going to the Versions tab and selecting the latest version.

Icon created by @vaniish
